evals.name: Minimalist Design System
evals.description: Create a minimalist design system for a productivity app
evals.prompt: Create a visual design system for a minimalist productivity app. Target: professionals who value simplicity and focus.

evals.name: Playful Design System
evals.description: Create a playful design system for a consumer app
evals.prompt: Create a visual design system for a social recipe sharing app. Target: home cooks, casual and fun tone.

evals.name: Professional Design System
evals.description: Create a professional design system for enterprise software
evals.prompt: Create a visual design system for an enterprise analytics platform. Target: corporate users, trustworthy and authoritative.
